# 💻 .vscode — Editor Configuration

> **Purpose:** VS Code workspace settings for consistent editor behavior across the team.

## Files

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `settings.json` | Editor preferences (formatting, linting, file associations) |
| `arm_toolchain.json` | ARM-specific toolchain configuration |

## Rules
- Keep settings portable — avoid absolute paths
- Prefer project-level over user-level settings
